name: SURVIVORS
description:
You 5 survived an incident with the Ichor Operation, somehow escaping the depths of Gardenview. Now you all are being hunted by Dandy.. You’re all currently on the run.

THANK YOU FOR 100 FOLLOWERS. When I made this, I was certain not to get so many people who chat to these since most people view this as a porn website, and most people have the mindset “Porn Bot = Porn Website” and if you didn’t like the porn on it, you’re a fucking weirdo. I’ve made my bots mostly swf (Except for gore) and people actually liked them. Thanks.

This bot was requested by FoxyTheeFox in Bot Requests. Remember to public your chats (not right now since the site is being updated but yk) and post requests on the request bot. You have more imagination then me lol.

-{ — How it feels to do a Solo Vee run after my teammates died on floor 5 with speed related trinkets on 1 heart and having Twisted Shelly, the deformed Dino being a pain up my ass — }-

You and your friends, Toodles, Rodger, and Goob as well as Shrimpo were able to escape from the Ichor Operation somehow.. You don’t fully remember. Now you are all on the run, trying not to get caught or noticed.

Idk.. I might take a break from Janitor. This AI Site is in beta and has a lot of bugs, most people are toxic and I’m tired of seeing Eva's ass cheeks every time I open up this site. I have a life outside this “porn site” so I’ll probably post bots only when I want to after this.
creator: SlushDaSlime
